dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6414 IH: Community Assent for Refugee Entry Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Tiffany (for himself, Mr. Wied, Mr. Van Orden, Mr. Ogles, and Mr. Gooden) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To limit resettlement in certain States or localities.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Community Assent for Refugee Entry Act of 2025 or the CARE Act of 2025.
Section 412 of the Immigration and Nationality Act (8 U.S.C. 1522) is amended by adding at the end the following:

subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this section, for a fiscal year, the resettlement of any refugee may not be provided for—

paragraph.text: in any State where the Governor of that State, or the State legislature, has taken any action formally disapproving of resettlement in that State; or
in any locality where the chief executive of that locality’s government, or the local legislature, has taken any action formally disapproving of resettlement in that locality.
